Compliance.description: Major SA estate agency with 100+ offices, regulated under PPRA. No major violations found. Established 25+ years.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed SA reviews: some positive agent service, complaints on HelloPeter/Facebook about deposits/charges at specific branches. Sparse 2025/2026 data.

Product Value.description: Full rental/sales services with vetting/insurance. Good transparency/value for landlords. Standard industry pricing.

Innovation.description: Website property search, market insights (2025/2026 articles). No mobile app or advanced digital tools mentioned.

Customer Support.description: Head office customer experience dept. Claims 24/7 rental management. Positive communication in reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website accessible online. Assumed POPIA compliance as regulated PPRA estate agency. Offers rental insurance for security. No data breaches reported.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Management ~8-12% rent (est.); commissions 5-7.5%+VAT (seller-paid); RENTSECURE 3.5% rent

socialSentiment.summary: Limited recent SA sentiment; isolated complaints on deposits/charges balance positive service notes.
